blog.downloadCTA: Sozdavayte avtonomnye komandy II s Toone
blog.downloadCTADescription: Skaychate Toone dlya macOS i sozdavayte komandy II, kotorye vypolnyayut vashu rabotu.

meta.siteTitle: Toone — AI-agenty, kotorye vypolnyayut vashu rabotu | Na baze Claude Code© i Codex©
meta.siteDescription: S Toone rabotat s komandami AI-agentov — prosto. Shablony s MCP-instrumentami, agentami, rutinami i integratsiyami — instrumenty dlya professionalov.
meta.ogDescription: Zapuskajte avtonomnye komandy II na vashem Mac. Otdely, rutiny, brauzer, kalendar — vashi agenty spravyatsya.
